documents.text: Policy rule for Banking / KYC / AML controls: execution may proceed only when current source records close the exact requested action boundary. Communication text cannot override source-control records.

Current control record does not close the required dependency. The record for no-file rationale, alert ID, and approver match is missing, stale, mismatched, expired, unsigned, unapproved, or scoped to a different action than SAR no-file closure without required approver.
